phrases.intent_en: Ask where the Baptismal Font is
phrases.cultural_note: In Portuguese churches, the baptismal font is traditionally placed near the entrance or a side aisle to symbolize entry into the faith.

likely_response.local: Pergunte ao sacristão ou ao guia voluntário.
likely_response.pronunciation: peh-ruh-GOONNG-tih OW suhk-reesh-TOWN OHW OW GEEUH voo-loonng-TAHR-yoo.
likely_response.translation_en: Ask the sacristan or the volunteer guide.

responses.english: Ask the sacristan or the volunteer guide.
responses.phonetic: peh-ruh-GOONNG-tih OW suhk-reesh-TOWN OHW OW GEEUH voo-loonng-TAHR-yoo.
responses.french: Pergunte ao sacristão ou ao guia voluntário.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the Baptismal Font is
phrases.cultural_note: A Fonte Batismal é um dos elementos estáveis listados para esta igreja.

likely_response.local: Pergunte ao Pároco local ou ao Sacristão.
likely_response.pronunciation: peh-ruh-GOONNG-tih OW PAH-roo-koo loo-KAHL OHW OW suhk-reesh-TOWN.
likely_response.translation_en: Ask the local priest or the sacristan.

responses.english: Ask the local priest or the sacristan.
responses.phonetic: peh-ruh-GOONNG-tih OW PAH-roo-koo loo-KAHL OHW OW suhk-reesh-TOWN.
responses.french: Pergunte ao Pároco local ou ao Sacristão.

phrases.text_local: Onde posso encontrar a Torre Sineira?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih PAW-soo ayng-koongt-RAHR AH TAW-rih see-NAY-ruh?

likely_response.local: Siga as placas para a Torre Sineira.
likely_response.pronunciation: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AH TAW-rih see-NAY-ruh.
likely_response.translation_en: Follow the signs to the Bell Tower.

responses.english: Follow the signs to the Bell Tower.
responses.phonetic: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AH TAW-rih see-NAY-ruh.
responses.french: Siga as placas para a Torre Sineira.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the side chapel is
phrases.text_local: Pode indicar onde fica a Capela lateral?
phrases.pronunciation: PAW-dih een-dee-KAHR OHNG-dih FEE-kuh AH kuh-PEH-luh luh-tih-RAHL?
phrases.cultural_note: Side chapels in Portuguese parish churches often house specific devotional images or relics, typically arranged along the lateral aisles.

likely_response.local: Pode perguntar ao Sacristão ou ao Pároco local, eles indicam-lhe a Capela lateral.
likely_response.pronunciation: PAW-dih peh-ruh-goonng-TAHR OW suhk-reesh-TOWN OHW OW PAH-roo-koo loo-KAHL, EH-lihsh een-DEE-kuhng-LYIH AH kuh-PEH-luh luh-tih-RAHL.
likely_response.translation_en: You can ask the Sacristan or the local Parish Priest, they will show you the side chapel.

responses.english: You can ask the Sacristan or the local Parish Priest, they will show you the side chapel.
responses.phonetic: PAW-dih peh-ruh-goonng-TAHR OW suhk-reesh-TOWN OHW OW PAH-roo-koo loo-KAHL, EH-lihsh een-DEE-kuhng-LYIH AH kuh-PEH-luh luh-tih-RAHL.
responses.french: Pode perguntar ao Sacristão ou ao Pároco local, eles indicam-lhe a Capela lateral.

phrases.text_local: Como posso saber mais sobre a torre sineira da igreja?
phrases.pronunciation: KOH-moo PAW-soo suh-BEHR MEYESH SOHB-rih AH TAW-rih see-NAY-ruh DUH eeg-REH-zhuh?

likely_response.local: Pergunte ao guia voluntário ou ao pároco local. Eles costumam dar informações sobre a torre sineira.
likely_response.pronunciation: peh-ruh-GOONNG-tih OW GEEUH voo-loonng-TAHR-yoo OHW OW PAH-roo-koo loo-KAHL. EH-lihsh koosh-TOO-muhng DAHR een-foo-ruh-muh-SOHNYSH SOHB-rih AH TAW-rih see-NAY-ruh.
likely_response.translation_en: Ask the volunteer guide or the local parish priest. They usually provide information about the bell tower.

responses.english: Ask the volunteer guide or the local parish priest. They usually provide information about the bell tower.
responses.phonetic: peh-ruh-GOONNG-tih OW GEEUH voo-loonng-TAHR-yoo OHW OW PAH-roo-koo loo-KAHL. EH-lihsh koosh-TOO-muhng DAHR een-foo-ruh-muh-SOHNYSH SOHB-rih AH TAW-rih see-NAY-ruh.
responses.french: Pergunte ao guia voluntário ou ao pároco local. Eles costumam dar informações sobre a torre sineira.
